title: Turkish opposition fights court ousting of leaders in ruling boosting Erdogan
summary_full: The appeal court declared Özgür Özel's party leadership victory void, further cementing the president's grip on power.
summary_public: The appeal court declared Özgür Özel's party leadership victory void, further cementing the president's grip on power.
